subcodes.first_line: O noble descendant of an illustrious lineage! Thou hast inquired about this blessed passage which was sent down from the heaven of grace in the Tablet to thy departed father [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل نبیل جلیل سوال از این عبارت مبارکه که در لوح مرحوم والد از سماء فضل نازل
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom
